name: sympy
tagline: Reference guide for exact symbolic math in Python via SymPy — algebra, calculus, equation solving, linear algebra, physics, code generation.
verdict: Clean, well-organized SymPy cookbook with no security concerns: pinned install, clear trigger/negative-trigger scope, modular reference files keep SKILL.md compact, and a troubleshooting section covers common failure modes. Output shape and re-run behavior are inherently task-dependent for a stateless reference skill, not real gaps.
